confidence_rationale: Loop placement at marked line appears accurate from available views, though exact positioning difficult to assess from camera angles. Task completion clearly visible with no obvious penalties.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from marked line due to camera angle limitations
technique_summary: Competent novice performance with methodical approach to each phase. Time primarily lost in cutting phase (40s vs expert 5-10s benchmark). No major technical errors observed.
strengths: Systematic approach to each task phase
improvement_suggestions: Reduce time in cutting phase - practice efficient tail trimming
Work on faster loop deployment to improve overall time to intermediate level (under 90s)
